title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird, founder of Koah Labs, argues that ad-based monetization rather than subscriptions is the future for AI tools, having raised $26M on this thesis. He identifies human trust adoption, not technology, as the primary bottleneck limiting AI agent deployment.
